text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Come get yourself a
good-morning cuddle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That should cheer ya up! Oh, looks like
somebody else needs a good mood-boostin'
too...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've been out here squeezing some energy into
anybody lookin' too down in the dumps!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my day off yesterday, my energy
reserves are overflowing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like Taiki Shuttle got in some good rest.
